full_text:
Li Wenhou 李文侯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Wenhou (李文侯). Part of Beigong Boyu’s rebellion. Killed by Han Sui, who took command of his troops. Li Wenhou was affiliated with Qiang. Li Wenhou lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
